nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, “Do not listen to the words of the prophets who are prophesying to you. They are leading you into futility; They speak a vision of their own imagination, Not from the mouth of the Lord.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts: “Do not listen to the words of the prophets who prophesy to you, filling you with vain hopes. They speak visions of their own minds, not from the mouth of the Lord.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “不要聽從這些向你們說預言的先知所說的話， 他們使你們存有虛幻的希望； 他們所講的異象是出於自己的心思， 不是出於耶和華的口。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华对祂的子民说：“你们不要听信这些先知的预言，他们使你们充满虚假的盼望，他们的预言是自己编的，不是耶和华说的。
